purpose: JSON array of manifest tool names that must never be exposed as MCP tools, keeping dynamic-instrumentation and credential tools out of reach of AI agents.
invariants: Must be a JSON array of strings matching manifest tool names exactly
Entries are matched case-sensitively against manifest 'name' fields
An empty or missing file is treated as an empty denylist (server does not error)
gotchas: frida is denylisted because it is a dynamic-instrumentation tool that could be misused by an AI agent
sshpass is denylisted because it handles credentials and must not be invocable by an AI agent
New high-risk tools (credential managers, network sniffers, kernel-level tools) should be added here before adding them to the manifest
